data.content: Implemented a tighter scrollbar gutter reservation for beats screens by changing `src/app/globals.css` to `scrollbar-gutter: stable both-edges;` and updated `src/lib/__tests__/beats-page-layout.test.ts` to lock that contract. Validation: `bun run lint` (passes with one pre-existing React Compiler warning in `src/components/beat-form.tsx:368`), `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test` (207 files, 2365 tests passed), and `bun run build` all passed. Browser verification on `http://localhost:3010/beats?repo=%2FUsers%2Fcartine%2Ffoolery` using Playwright showed identical header coordinates across Queues, ReTakes, and Diagnostics: Home left=54.474px/right=206.463px; rightmost nav left=1186.633px/right=1317.500px in every measured transition state. Branch: `foolery-44f1-fix-jitter`, commit: `440b0eeb`.
